headline: 火遮眼领跑今日热搜，龙族热度不减
headlineEn: Fire Blinds Eyes Tops Today's Trends, Dragon Clan Stays Hot
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：火遮眼、痴迷等影片领跑热搜，本周新片包括福尔摩斯小姐3等。行业聚焦流媒体竞争与经典IP续作。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Fire Blinds Eyes and Obsession lead trending, with new releases like Enola Holmes 3 this week. Industry highlights streaming competition and classic IP sequels.

industryHighlights.text: 流媒体平台争夺暑期档，原创剧集竞争白热化
industryHighlights.en: Streaming platforms vie for summer blockbuster slots, original series competition heats up

industryHighlights.text: 经典IP续作频出，福尔摩斯小姐3与穿普拉达的女王2引热议
industryHighlights.en: Classic IP sequels surge, Enola Holmes 3 and Devil Wears Prada 2 spark buzz

industryHighlights.text: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日预告片点击量破纪录
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Fresh Day trailer breaks viewership records

industryHighlights.text: 《后室》与《末日地堡》等科幻新作口碑分化
industryHighlights.en: Sci-fi newcomers The Backrooms and Silo receive mixed reviews
